shared_properties: The clear panel occupies a 480x240 px centered overlay designed for post-floor feedback without covering the entire scene.
Core palette metadata remains primary #C9A84C, background #0D0B14, and accent #D4682A while rank-state colors stay inside specs.colors_hex.
Layout reserves distinct regions for rank letter, clear time, Par Time comparison, and Shadow Shard count.
differences: This state sheet includes S, A, B, and C rank frame variants rather than drawing every rank with runtime typography alone.
Higher ranks intensify gold filigree and amber spotlight wedges, while lower ranks keep a calmer trim treatment.
A central 96 px medallion frame is reserved for the rank letter and supports a strong end-of-floor focal point.

reference_images.label: gdd_markdown
reference_images.purpose: Grounds Shadow Rank feedback, Par Time comparison, and floor-clear summary flow.

reference_images.label: moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the celebratory gold-and-violet finish used after a solved floor.

reference_images.label: umbra_character
reference_images.purpose: Grounds the need to keep solved-scene visibility behind the results overlay.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load the clear-panel atlas during FloorLoading and select the authored frame that matches the computed floor rank.
runtime_notes: Fade the overlay in after the exit-door sequence completes.
Keep runtime text inside reserved slots for clear time, Par Time delta, and shard count.
Preserve enough transparency around the panel perimeter that the solved floor remains faintly visible.

context.usage: Centered clear-screen overlay used after each floor to display rank, clear time, and collectible summary.

layout_notes: Central rank medallion diameter is 96 px.
Shard summary panel width is 112 px.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 1920x240 px with four 480x240 frames and 0 px spacing.
All four rank variants remain readable and distinct through trim intensity, medallion treatment, and accent use.
Reserved text regions fit clear time, Par Time delta, and Shadow Shard count without clipping borders.
